# id_from_regional_id (Function)

Given a regional ID string value, returns the ID without the region prefix.

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
id_from_regional_id(regional_id string, skip_region_validation bool) string
```

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `regional_id` (String) regional ID to extract the ID from
1. `skip_region_validation` (Boolean, Nullable) If true, will skip region validation with the region known by the Scaleway SDK.
